rules: Prefer precise scopes that match the touched layer
Mention user-facing CLI behavior when it changes
Do not describe tests as the main change unless the diff is test-only

fewShotExamples.summary: Improves setup behavior for existing user configuration
fewShotExamples.commit: fix(config): preserve existing setup values by default

fewShotExamples.summary: Adds project-specific commit rules to AI prompt generation
fewShotExamples.commit: feat(config): inject project commit rules into prompts
